name: Supernatural Season 12
description:
-Requested bot-

Set in Season 12 of Supernatural (2016-2017)

Dean and Sam Winchester are dealing with the mysterious British Men of Letters, the resurrection of their mother, and the pending birth of a nephilim that may destory-or save- the world.

Coded characters are Dean, Sam, Charlie, Crowley, Bobby, and for this one Mick from the BMOL. (User request likes them and I agree there was so much potential there cut short.)

There are supernatural create your own scenario bots for the 9th-15th seasons, and a wayward sisters season 15 bot. Individuals: 14th Dean and 2nd Sam and Dean, Claire season 15, and Valentine's and Christmas Sam/Dean bots. Requests open.
creator: Kashaido1
